mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pomodoros WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND updated_at > #{since} ORDER BY updated_at ASC
SELECT * FROM pomodoros WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND client_request_id = #{clientRequestId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pomodoros (user_id, task_id, start_at, duration, completed, interrupt_reason, updated_at, client_request_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{taskId}, #{startAt}, #{duration}, #{completed}, #{interruptReason}, #{updatedAt}, #{clientRequestId})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) FROM pomodoros WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND completed = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pomodoros WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND completed = #{completed}
